# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE OP-21 Progress

**Filed:** 2026-06-21  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We are accumulating 100+ new bear-only observations for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher to satisfy the OP-21 promotion gate (WR ≥ 55% sustained over N>100 new bear-only observations). We will compute the WR and edge capture per VIX regime and project the timeline to reach the gate.

## Mechanism

The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher (updated 2026-05-21) is set to accumulate bear-only observations. We are tracking the count, win rate, and P&L of new bear-only observations since 2026-05-21. We are stratifying by VIX regime (VIX<15, 15-20, 20-25, 25+) to compute WR and edge capture per regime.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The watcher observations are account-size agnostic; however, the underlying strategy (BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON) requires $25K+ for full qty (15 contracts). For $1K paper, each observation represents ~6.7% of the full qty P&L.
2. **Sample bias:** We are accumulating new bear-only observations since 2026-05-21. The sample is subject to time-period bias (regime-dependent) and may not be representative of all market conditions. Overfit risk is low as we are not optimizing parameters but merely observing.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are accumulating in-sample; OOS will be future data)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (the watcher observations are based on simulated fills; real-fills validation requires live trading)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: a bear observation that results in a large loss (e.g., -$200+)
   - Max drawdown: cumulative losses over a sequence of bear observations
   - Blow-up scenario: a prolonged period of low WR (<40%) in bear observations causing the gate to fail
6. **Concentration:** We will disclose the concentration of P&L in the top 5 days once we have 100+ observations.

## Pre-merge gate

We require:
   - 100+ new bear-only observations accumulated since 2026-05-21
   - WR ≥ 55% on these observations
   - VIX regime stratification showing WR ≥ 50% in each regime (or at least not negative in any regime)
   - Real-fills validation on a subset (if available) showing similar WR

## Confidence

6 / 10 -- We are in the process of accumulating observations; the current rate suggests we will reach the gate in ~3-4 months if the VIX_MODERATE regime persists.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not change the candidate; it only reports progress toward the OP-21 gate for the existing candidate V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE. It complements the leaderboard entry by providing an update on the promotion gate status.
